task_description: Implement all 25+1 feature flags with admin UI, distance-aware ETA algorithm with eta_display_mode feature flag (default: only show after rider assigned), customer bill/invoice on tracking page, and map marker redesign with colored differentiated markers.

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles cleanly (tsc --noEmit). Lint passes (only pre-existing warnings). 61/63 unit tests pass - 2 failures are pre-existing and unrelated to changes (DELIVERY_OUT_OF_RANGE error message format and scroll CSS touch-action).
